vocab.translation: bien podría / es muy probable que

lessons.title: Condicionales con inversión
lessons.topic: Had I / Were I to / Should you

items.prompt: Elige la forma correcta:
options: Had I known about the meeting, I would have attended.
If I would have known about the meeting, I had attended.
Had I knew about the meeting, I would have attended.
items.value: Had I known about the meeting, I would have attended.

items.prompt: Completa el condicional con inversión:
items.text: ___ I known earlier, I would have helped.
accepted: Had
items.value: Had

items.prompt: Elige la forma correcta:
options: Were I to accept the offer, I'd relocate to Berlin.
Was I to accept the offer, I'd relocate to Berlin.
Were I accepting to the offer, I'd relocate to Berlin.
items.value: Were I to accept the offer, I'd relocate to Berlin.

items.prompt: Completa con inversión (oferta hipotética futura):
items.text: ___ I to lose this job, I'd start my own business.
accepted: Were
items.value: Were

items.prompt: Ordena (inversión condicional): "Si llegaras a necesitar ayuda, llámame."
items.value: Should you need help, call me

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: Had it not been for her support, I would never have finished the thesis.

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: Should you require assistance, our team is available around the clock.
If you required assistance, our team was available around the clock.
Should you required assistance, our team is available around the clock.
items.value: Should you require assistance, our team is available around the clock.

items.prompt: Traduce al inglés (condicional/modal avanzado): "De haberlo sabido, te habría avisado."
items.source: De haberlo sabido, te habría avisado.
items.value: Had I known, I would have told you.
accepted: Had I known, I would have told you.
Had I known, I would have warned you.
Had I known, I'd have told you.
Had I known, I'd have warned you.

lessons.title: Condicionales mixtos
lessons.topic: Pasado que afecta el presente y viceversa

items.prompt: Elige la forma correcta:
options: If I had studied medicine, I would be a doctor now.
If I had studied medicine, I would have been a doctor now.
If I studied medicine, I would be a doctor now.
items.value: If I had studied medicine, I would be a doctor now.

items.prompt: Completa el condicional mixto (pasado → presente):
items.text: If she ___ saved more, she wouldn't be broke today.
accepted: had
items.value: had

items.prompt: Elige la forma correcta (presente → pasado):
options: If I were more organised, I wouldn't have missed the deadline.
If I had been more organised, I wouldn't be missing the deadline.
If I were more organised, I wouldn't miss the deadline yesterday.
items.value: If I were more organised, I wouldn't have missed the deadline.

items.prompt: Arma la frase: "Si hablara francés, habría conseguido ese puesto."
Completa el condicional mixto:
items.text: If they had invested wisely, they ___ wealthy now.
accepted: would be
items.value: would be

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: If I hadn't quit my last job, I would be stuck in that office right now.

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: If he had listened to me, he wouldn't be in this mess now.
If he listened to me, he wouldn't have been in this mess now.
If he had listened to me, he wouldn't have been in this mess then.
items.value: If he had listened to me, he wouldn't be in this mess now.

items.prompt: Traduce al inglés (condicional/modal avanzado): "Si hubiera ahorrado, ahora no estaría preocupado."
items.source: Si hubiera ahorrado, ahora no estaría preocupado.
items.value: If I had saved, I wouldn't be worried now.
accepted: If I had saved, I wouldn't be worried now.
If I had saved money, I wouldn't be worried now.
Had I saved, I wouldn't be worried now.
If I'd saved, I wouldn't be worried now.

lessons.title: Matiz modal: probabilidad y deducción
lessons.topic: might well, must have, could have

items.prompt: Empareja el modal con su matiz:
Elige la forma correcta (deducción del pasado):
options: She must have left already; her coat is gone.
She must left already; her coat is gone.
She must have to leave already; her coat is gone.
items.value: She must have left already; her coat is gone.

items.prompt: Completa (probabilidad alta):
items.text: That plan might ___ work, but it's risky.
accepted: well
items.value: well

items.prompt: Elige la forma correcta (posibilidad pasada no cumplida):
options: You could have warned me before signing it.
You could have warn me before signing it.
You could warned me before signing it.
items.value: You could have warned me before signing it.

items.prompt: Ordena: "Bien podría llover más tarde."
items.value: It might well rain later

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: He must have misread the schedule, otherwise he could have caught the earlier train.

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: They might well have missed the connection by now.
They might have well missed the connection by now.
They must well have missed the connection by now.
items.value: They might well have missed the connection by now.

items.prompt: Traduce al inglés (condicional/modal avanzado): "Debe de haber olvidado la reunión."
items.source: Debe de haber olvidado la reunión.
items.value: He must have forgotten the meeting.
accepted: He must have forgotten the meeting.
She must have forgotten the meeting.
They must have forgotten the meeting.
He must have forgotten about the meeting.

lessons.title: Matiz modal: arrepentimiento y preferencia
lessons.topic: needn't have, ought to have, would rather, may as well

items.prompt: Empareja el modal con su matiz:
Elige la forma correcta (esfuerzo innecesario):
options: You needn't have cooked; we'd already eaten.
You needn't cooked; we'd already eaten.
You don't need have cooked; we'd already eaten.
items.value: You needn't have cooked; we'd already eaten.

items.prompt: Completa (reproche por algo no hecho):
items.text: You ___ to have told me sooner.
accepted: ought
items.value: ought

items.prompt: Elige la forma correcta (preferencia con sujeto distinto):
options: I'd rather you didn't mention it to anyone.
I'd rather you don't mentioned it to anyone.
I'd rather you wouldn't mention it to anyone.
items.value: I'd rather you didn't mention it to anyone.

items.prompt: Arma la frase: "Ya que estamos aquí, más vale que nos quedemos."
Lee en voz alta:
items.text: You needn't have worried; the results ought to have reassured everyone.

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: We may as well leave now, since the train's been cancelled.
We must as well leave now, since the train's been cancelled.
We may well as leave now, since the train's been cancelled.
items.value: We may as well leave now, since the train's been cancelled.

items.prompt: Traduce al inglés (condicional/modal avanzado): "Preferiría que no llegaras tarde."
items.value: I'd rather you didn't arrive late.
accepted: I'd rather you didn't arrive late.
I would rather you didn't arrive late.
I'd rather you weren't late.
I would rather you weren't late.
I'd rather you didn't come late.

options: Were it not for your advice, I'd have made a terrible mistake.
Was it not for your advice, I'd have made a terrible mistake.
Were it not for your advice, I'd made a terrible mistake.
checkpoint.value: Were it not for your advice, I'd have made a terrible mistake.

checkpoint.prompt: Empareja el modal con su matiz:

checkpoint.text: If I had taken that flight, I ___ be home by now.
accepted: would

checkpoint.text: ___ you change your mind, the offer still stands.
accepted: Should

checkpoint.prompt: Ordena (inversión condicional): "De no haber sido por la lluvia, habríamos ido."
checkpoint.value: Had it not been for the rain, we would have gone

checkpoint.prompt: Traduce al inglés (condicional/modal avanzado): "No deberías haber pagado tanto."
checkpoint.value: You oughtn't to have paid so much.
accepted: You oughtn't to have paid so much.
You ought not to have paid so much.
You shouldn't have paid so much.
You ought not to have paid that much.
You shouldn't have paid that much.

checkpoint.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: Had I realised the cost, I would never have agreed to it.
If I realised the cost, I would never agree to it.
Had I realised the cost, I would never agreed to it.
checkpoint.value: Had I realised the cost, I would never have agreed to it.

checkpoint.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: She could have called, but she may well have lost my number.
She could called, but she may well have lost my number.
She could have called, but she might well lost my number.
checkpoint.value: She could have called, but she may well have lost my number.

checkpoint.text: Were I to start over, I would rather pursue research than management.
But for that one decision, I might well be living abroad today.
